title: Hire through the Rural and Francophone Community Immigration Pilots - Canada.ca
content:
## Hire through the Rural and Francophone Community Immigration pilots
If you’re an employer in a participating community, these pilots can help you hire qualified candidates for jobs you haven’t been able to fill locally. To participate, you must complete our free training and apply to your participating community.
You can then make job offers and ask your community to recommend eligible candidates for permanent residence.

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
